title: The water in the word

segments.text: The water in the word, the water in the word,
Washing by the water, the water in the word,
That He might sanctify her, cleansing her,
Cleansing by the washing of the water in the word.
Husbands, love your wives
Even as Christ loved the church
And gave Himself up for her,
Gave Himself up for her.
The water in the word, the water in the word,
Washing by the water, the water in the word,
That He might sanctify her, cleansing her,
Cleansing by the washing of the water in the word,
That He might present
The church to Himself glorious,
Not having spot or wrinkle
Or any such things, any such things.
The water in the word, the water in the word,
Washing by the water, the water in the word,
That He might sanctify her, cleansing her,
Cleansing by the washing of the water in the word.
